incorrects.description: Student clicked a wrong graph on first attempt

steps.text: Look closely. Count the lines on each graph. Which one has the fewest?

incorrects.description: Student clicked a wrong graph on second attempt

steps.text: Let me help. The graph on the right shows only 2 lines: 0, 10, 20. Count the lines on the others. Which has the fewest?

incorrects.description: Student clicked a wrong graph three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: Scale of 10 graph highlights to show the correct answer.

steps.text: Let me show you. The scale of 1 graph has 20 lines. The scale of 2 has 10 lines. The scale of 5 has 4 lines. The scale of 10 has only 2 lines. Scale of 10 uses the fewest lines because each line represents a bigger jump.
